author: ahjan

title.ja-JP: そのループは思考ではない

translation_provenance.ja-JP: Tier 1 inline V1 baseline; Pearl_Localization native-speaker review recommended pre-WEBTOON-Japan publish

v1_caveats.identity_drift: Expected — V2 closes via the hybrid character-individuation pipeline per docs/CHARACTER_INDIVIDUATION_PIPELINE_SPEC_2026-05-02.md (12-axis vocabulary + constraint solver + PuLID-FaceNet + face-distance QA harness; ~5-7 engineering days). Tracked by ws_manga_layered_pipeline_v2_20260507.
v1_caveats.register_oscillation: schnell-correct config (4 steps / cfg 1.0 / euler / simple) mitigates the 28-step audit defect; seinen-photorealistic register comes from prompts not LoRA — V2 brand-style LoRA + animeoutlineV4 register layer + halftone close further per spec.
v1_caveats.ja_jp_translation: Tier 1 V1 baseline; native-speaker review recommended pre-WEBTOON-Japan publish.

structure.preview_pngs: <prefix>ep_001_<locale>.webtoon.png  (single combined preview for visual review; 800x40350 each)
structure.segments: <prefix>segments/<locale>/ep_001_<locale>_seg_NNN.jpg  (sliced for WEBTOON Canvas upload; 25 segments per locale, ~3.8 MB total per locale)
